headings: BROWNSTONE CONSTRUCTION, LTD. SUBCONTRACT FOR Allegra at Shreveport
text: - 3.7. Within  three  business  days  of  the  execution  of  this  Subcontract,  Subcontractor  shall  provide  a written document to Contractor's job superintendent containing the name, address and home and cellular telephone number  of  Subcontractor's  designated  project  superintendent  and  of  an  alternate  contact  to  be  used  during  the absence of the project superintendent.
